serena_lsp_status: OPERATIONAL since 2026-05-07. Key: find_symbol --name_path_pattern (NOT --name_path); receiver methods need '(*Type).method' qualified form; find_referencing_symbols requires --relative_path as file (not dir); search_for_pattern uses --substring_pattern. Use JSON stdin pipe with '.' sentinel. find_referencing_symbols ~2.3s-4.9s for focused queries (Runs 9-10). WARNING: broad find_symbol queries (e.g. function name without kind filter) can take 70+ seconds - prefer Grep for plain lookups. Tool list stable for 8 runs (23 tools).

Plus mcp_inspect_mcp.go:253 OMITS Timeout entirely. Run 11 CONFIRMED still unfixed - no DefaultHTTPClientTimeout in pkg/constants yet (10+ days from original Run 8 finding).
completed_scans.dead_code_utility_packages: Run 8: 9 utility packages audited - all healthy. sliceutil 90 uses across 43 files, typeutil 115 across 15 files, stringutil 538 across 195 files, semverutil 11 across 8 files, jsonutil 5 across 3 files. envutil.GetIntFromEnv: 1 prod site (logs_orchestrator.go) - borderline acceptable.
completed_scans.workflow_dir_string_literal: Run 11 RE-AUDIT: GetWorkflowDir adoption now EXCELLENT - only 1 prod literal of '.github/workflows' string remains (cli/add_package_manifest.go:28 as slice element, distinct purpose). Most other matches are comments or docs. HOWEVER 5 sites use filepath.Join(*, '.github', 'workflows') which BYPASS the env-var override: dispatch_workflow_file_resolver.go:70 (search dir), copilot_setup.go:186 (MkdirAll target), init.go:214 (Stat check), dispatch_workflow_validation.go:61 + call_workflow_validation.go:75 (error msg only). Issue #aw_sgbo1.
completed_scans.top_level_interfaces_pkg: Run 9: 21 top-level interfaces in pkg/ non-test. DUPLICATION: SHAResolver (pkg/actionpins/actionpins.go:59) and ActionSHAResolver (pkg/workflow/action_resolver.go:16) identical single-method signatures - single impl *workflow.ActionResolver satisfies both. Issue #aw_sg9a2.
completed_scans.context_background_prod_sites: Run 10: 28 sites in pkg/ non-test. 23 defensible. 5 ACTIONABLE prod sites pass context.Background() to *ActionResolver.ResolveSHA (network call): pkg/workflow/maintenance_workflow.go:70, action_sha_checker.go:121 (EXPORTED), action_reference.go:78+116, pkg/cli/copilot_setup.go:25+35. Correct pattern already at pkg/actionpins/actionpins.go:317. Issue #aw_sgar1.

completed_scans.init_functions_pkg: Run 11: 11 init()s in pkg/ non-test. 8 legitimate (linter analyzer flag registration x2, wasm filesystem override x1, embedded JSON load x4, map-derivation from knownRuntimes x1). 3 STUB init()s do only log statements with no work: pkg/workflow/js.go:14-16 ('Script registration completed (embedded scripts removed)'), scripts.go:20-22 (same), expression_patterns.go:92-94 ('Initializing expression pattern regex compilation' but compilation actually happens in var blocks). Issue #aw_sgbo2.
completed_scans.time_after_prod_sites: Run 11: 4 time.After sites in pkg/ non-test. mcp_inspect_inspector.go:209 (one-shot 5s, fine). update_check.go:296 (one-shot 100ms, fine). add_interactive_workflow.go:41 + docker_images.go:194 ARE inside retry loops - low-severity timer leak per iteration. Not filed (low severity, max 5-10s timer overhead each).
completed_scans.defer_in_loop: Run 11: zero confirmed defer-in-loop hot spots in pkg/. Multi-line regex too noisy to be useful here - inspected files containing os.Open/os.Create against for/range loops manually, no real cases. Good Go discipline.
completed_scans.github_workflows_filepath_join_join: Run 11 UPDATED: 5 prod sites still use filepath.Join with literal '.github' + 'workflows' segments. They BYPASS GH_AW_WORKFLOWS_DIR env override. See workflow_dir_string_literal entry. Issue #aw_sgbo1.
completed_scans.lock_yml_extension_literal: Run 9: 41 occurrences of '.lock.yml' in 21 prod files. No central constants helper. Not filed (constant name would be longer than literal).
completed_scans.context_todo_prod_sites: Run 10: ZERO context.TODO() calls in pkg/ non-test. Excellent.

established_patterns.options_struct_model: CompileConfig in pkg/cli/compile_pipeline.go - reference model for refactors
established_patterns.string_constant_identity_switch: When const block defines `const Foo Scope = "foo"` and a switch maps "foo"->Foo, collapse to map-validated cast (see #aw_sg7a2)
established_patterns.pkg_constants_grouping: pkg/constants/constants.go is the canonical home for Default* constants. Adding new named timeouts/permissions there fits the pattern. Run 9 CONFIRMED Run 8 issue #aw_sg8a1 was implemented: FilePerm{Sensitive,Public} and DirPerm{Sensitive,Public} fs.FileMode constants now at pkg/constants/constants.go:73-91.
established_patterns.helper_underadoption_failure_mode: Pattern persistent across Runs 5/7/8/9/10/11: helper or constant exists in pkg/constants but call sites bypass it via literal duplication. Audit Default*/Get* helpers each run for adoption percentage. SECONDARY failure mode (Run 11): the helper itself is honored at most call sites but a different SHAPE of the same path (filepath.Join with split segments) bypasses the helper entirely - a 'shape mismatch' bypass distinct from 'literal duplication' bypass.
established_patterns.context_propagation_at_boundary_pattern: Correct pattern at pkg/actionpins/actionpins.go:317: `resolver.ResolveSHA(cmp.Or(ctx.Ctx, context.Background()), ...)` where struct carries optional Ctx. context.Background() ONLY at top-level boundaries (CLI entry, signal handlers, tests, non-Context convenience wrappers with parallel Context variants like RunGH/RunGHContext).
established_patterns.non_context_convenience_wrapper_pattern: pkg/workflow/github_cli.go RunGH/RunGHContext: short-name wrapper that creates Background and calls the Context variant. Acceptable when both variants are exported and named consistently. Defensible analog of stdlib's http.Get vs http.NewRequestWithContext.
established_patterns.init_function_acceptance_criteria: init() functions in pkg/ are acceptable when they: (a) register flags into an analysis.Analyzer (linter pattern), (b) override package-level function vars under build tags (wasm pattern), (c) load embedded JSON/data into package-level maps that are used at runtime, (d) derive maps from other package-level data (e.g. actionRepoToRuntime from knownRuntimes). NOT acceptable: log-only init() bodies whose comments admit the work was removed (Run 11 #aw_sgbo2 cases).

bash_policy_limits: Workspace shell blocks running multi-statement scripts (.sh files) and awk on /dev/null. mkdir/ls/wc/stat blocked outside /home/runner/work/gh-aw/gh-aw. Must Grep/Read directly and Write to memory directly (no mkdir). gh CLI in sandbox returns HTTP 403 on /meta endpoint - duplicate-issue detection by gh search not possible; rely on cache + safeoutputs. Heredoc with quote in brace expansion triggers 'brace with quote' policy - use Write tool to overwrite entire JSON/JSONL instead of bash append/heredoc. Run 11 reconfirmed: awk pipelines blocked even when piping multiple input files.
